lastStrategyDecision.reason: Market evidence is not strong enough for automated intraday execution: marketCondition is neutral, averageRelativeVolume ~1.0 offers no participation edge, averageGapPercent is slightly negative (-0.4%) reducing clean momentum continuation odds, averageLiquidityScore ~49.5 is only moderate (higher slippage/stop uncertainty), and averageCatalystScore ~21.8 is weak (lower follow-through probability). While liveFreshShare/liveFreshCount are strong (20/20), the overall tape quality remains low-conviction; maintain a conservative long-only pullback-to-VWAP plan with bracket exits for clear, auditable stops/targets, but avoid new orders until RVOL/liquidity/catalyst improve. Paper active exploration is enabled: live market data is fresh and the setup quality is acceptable, so the desk may take small paper trades while risk gates remain active.
